description: Per-project AutoEvolve configuration. Each target is a config artifact the optimizer may improve via mutate-score-revert. Per-target `enabled` is the default map (see _per_target_notes); the GLOBAL one-step off-switch is mutation_rules.v2_tuning_enabled in _graph/cache/delegation-config.json.

delegation-config._disabled_note: Ships OFF (per-target default map). delegation-config self-tuning carries demonstrated regression risk upstream, and lite has no deterministic delegation-config scorer for its task_type_routing schema yet. Opting in requires building that scorer first; the persist-gate would then guard it. Until then this target is present-but-disabled and the eligibility gate returns target-disabled.

_per_target_notes.detection-index: ON. Real headroom on a fresh install (cold-start far from saturation). MVP guard + persist-gate hold fire / auto-revert.
_per_target_notes.context-router: ON. Cleanest improvement record; additive-key schema is safe to mutate.
_per_target_notes.off-switch: Set _graph/cache/delegation-config.json -> mutation_rules.v2_tuning_enabled=false to halt ALL self-tuning (fitness-ledger appends AND every AutoEvolve target) in one step.
